title: Man threatened, robbed, allegedly by teens with broken scissors
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  Two teenagers, aged 14 and 16, allegedly threatened a man (44) with a pair of broken scissors before robbing him of some of his personal items on Point Road on Sunday 16 November.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Two teenagers, aged 14 and 16, allegedly threatened a man (44) with a pair of broken scissors before robbing him of some of his personal items on Point Road on Sunday 16 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Southern Cape Police’s spokesperson, Sergeant Chris Spies, said the incident occurred at about 11:00 and the two juveniles were arrested shortly afterwards."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Mossel Bay Police are investigating a case of robbery and the two teenagers will appear in court once they have been charged.","html":"The Mossel Bay Police are investigating a case of robbery and the two teenagers will appear in court once they have been charged."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Man threatened, robbed, allegedly by teens with broken scissors
